name: Amazon sellers processing 10–50 invoices/month tool
description: For Amazon sellers processing 10–50 invoices/month, poor contract management causes missed discounts. We provide a vendor management platform instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in managing vendor contracts and performance metrics
